fiabdocument.description:
FiabDocument (optional) - FIAB document to use as a template. Should
be a path to a FIAB document. Expects a GUI-style path (Client:/foo/bar)

msl.description: Master Security List. Analytics results will be written to the selected MSL. Expects a GUI-style path (Client:/foo/bar)

fisettingsdocument.description:
FISettingsDocument (optional) - The given @FIS document will be used to
configure analytics assumptions and settings. Expects a GUI-style path (Client:/foo/bar)
